sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55913" key="kathgo/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατηγόρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n55913.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">predication</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:108" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.108</biblScope> </bibl> (dub.).</sense> </entryFree>
